title: ICS Security Assessment Checklist
subtitle: Protect Your SCADA Systems from Industrial Cyber Attacks
description: Systematic assessment framework for plant engineers securing industrial control systems. Identify SCADA vulnerabilities, prevent unauthorized access, and implement GICSP-aligned controls before attackers exploit critical infrastructure gaps.
bullets: Audit 15+ critical SCADA security configuration areas
Ensure compliance with GICSP and IEC 62443
Identify vulnerabilities before regulatory audits detect them
Prioritize fixes without disrupting plant operations

title: SCADA Consultant Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: Benchmark SCADA consultant rates by credential and region
description: Compare current market rates for GICSP-certified SCADA consultants across geographies and credential levels. Build accurate budgets for plant security upgrades, automation projects, and compliance work with real 2026 data.
bullets: Regional pricing breakdown across 50 U.S. states
Certified vs. uncertified rate premium analysis
Project-based pricing for ICS audits and upgrades

title: SCADA Consultant Vetting Guide
subtitle: Find GICSP-certified SCADA consultants matched to your critical infrastructure
description: Critical infrastructure demands qualified SCADA partners. This guide reveals how utilities and plant engineers evaluate consultants on credentials, specialized experience, and compliance expertise—helping you avoid costly mistakes and ensure grid security.
bullets: Identify GICSP certification and grid-interconnection specialization requirements
Screen for minimum 7+ years managing critical SCADA systems
Evaluate NERC standards expertise and security assessment capabilities
Match consultant background to utility or generation plant needs
